title: Below are the articles and write‑ups I’ve written.

content: Hello, I’m Travis Andrews (aka B0mbpop). I’m a cybersecurity practitioner focused on penetration testing and red‑team engagements. This blog is where I share my write‑ups for Hack The Box, TryHackMe, and any other projects I’m working on.
section: Welcome to my site feel free to explore my write‑ups and articles!
title: Welcome to my site feel free to explore my write‑ups and articles!
